data.title: Bitcoin News: Deribit Sees Largest Ever Put Targeting $155K
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC USD) price fell below the $115,000 level amid the ongoing crypto market crash. Traders look for cues as another massive crypto options expiry valued at over $15. 5 billion approaches. Interestingly, the largest-ever Bitcoin put option was placed on the derivatives crypto exchange Deribit
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/25/bitcoin-news-deribit-sees-largest-ever-put-targeting-155k/

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-07-25)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.86T, down by -1.34% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $114,723 and $119,450 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $115,771, down by -2.41%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include MDT, IDEX, and HYPER, up by 85%, 44%, and 27%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Fintech Associations Urge Action Against JPMorgan's Data Access Fees

Market movers:

ETH: $3705.08 (+2.14%)

XRP: $3.1132 (+0.15%)

BNB: $768.95 (+0.37%)

SOL: $179.82 (-3.06%)

DOGE: $0.22935 (-2.77%)

ADA: $0.8017 (+0.25%)

TRX: $0.3154 (+2.30%)

WBTC: $115732.6 (-2.36%)

XLM: $0.4195 (-0.24%)

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $115k as Galaxy Digital dumps 30,000 BTC
data.description:
Bitcoin price fell 3% to below $115k, with intraday lows of $114,750. Galaxy Digital has deposited over 30,000 BTC. Lookonchain shared on-chain details indicating Galaxy sold over 10k on Binance, OKX and Bybit
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-drops-to-115k-as-galaxy-digital-dumps-30000-btc/
